title: Diff viewer modal for comparing editor content with disk or last-pushed version
purpose: Displays a unified diff between current editor code and either the file on disk or the last pushed version. Used for confirming changes before pushing and as a standalone preview tool.
module_context: Exports a React functional component DiffAgainstDiskModal that accepts props for controlling display and behavior, including loading state, error handling, and comparison mode switching.

steps.content: If no content is provided, return empty snippet values.
Attempt to parse the content as JSON.
Extract code, originalCode, and diskCode from the parsed data if they are strings.
If parsing fails, treat the entire content as the code value and return empty original and disk values.
If the path is empty, return an empty string.
Find the last occurrence of the forward slash character in the path.
If a slash is found, return the substring after the last slash.
If no slash is found, return the entire path.
Initialize state for parsed snippet data, loading status, error message, and comparison mode.
Fetch snippet data from the API when the modal opens.
Set up keyboard event listener for escape key to close the modal.
Handle confirmation action by calling the provided confirm callback and then closing the modal.
Render the modal UI with header, body showing diff or status messages, and footer with action buttons.
Display loading, error, or no changes messages in the body based on current state.
Show the diff viewer with appropriate titles and content based on the selected comparison mode.
Fetch snippet data when the modal opens.
Set up cancellation flag to prevent state updates after unmount.
Load snippet from API and update parsed state with the snippet content.
Handle errors during snippet loading by setting error state.
Set loading state to false after fetch completes.
Set up keyboard event listener for escape key to close the modal.
Clean up the keyboard event listener when the component unmounts.
Call the provided confirm callback if it exists.
Close the modal after confirming or after the confirm callback completes.
